zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Trafford於大約1360年出生在英國藍卡爾特拉福德 曼諾時，她的父親Henry de Trafford70歲，母親Agnes Doterinde59歲。她於1371年與Sir John Radcliffe Chadderton在英國結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1434年8月4日在英國藍卡爾薩爾福德享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de Trafford于大约1360年出生在英国藍卡爾特拉福德 曼諾时，她的父亲Henry de Trafford70岁，母亲Agnes Doterinde59岁。她于1371年与Sir John Radcliffe Chadderton在英国结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1434年8月4日在英国藍卡爾薩爾福德享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Trafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Trafford (Lancashire), Trafford in Chipping Warden (Northamptonshire), and Bridge, Mickle, and Wimbolds Trafford (Cheshire). The Northamptonshire placename probably derives from Old English træppe ‘trap’ + ford ‘ford’. The Cheshire placenames derive from Old English trōg ‘trough’ + ford. The Lancashire placename is a development of Stretford (Lancashire); most cases of the surname probably derive from this place. Early members of the de Trafford family, recorded here from the 13th century, were also recorded in medieval documents as de Stratford(e). Both the surname and the placename lost the initial S-. The manor of Trafford was carved out of Stretford township, and perhaps because its manor house was located at some distance from Stretford village, Trafford was adopted for the new settlement from an early date. See also Stratford .

variants.name: Stratford
meanings: habitational name from any of various places called Stratford, for example in Bedfordshire, Buckinghamshire, Middlesex, Northamptonshire, Suffolk, Warwickshire, and Wiltshire, from Old English strǣt ‘Roman road’ (see Street ) + ford ‘ford’.

habitational name principally from Strafford Sands (now lost) in Mexborough (Yorkshire), presumed to be the ancient meeting-place of Strafforth Wapentake, and deriving from the same source as 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Trafford was born about 1360, in Trafford Manor, Lancashire, England, her father, Henry de Trafford, was 70 and her mother, Agnes Doterinde, was 59. She married Sir John Radcliffe Chadderton in 1371, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 4 August 1434, in Salford, Lancashire, England, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Trafford est née environ 1360, à Trafford Manor, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Trafford, avait 70 ans et sa mère, Agnes Doterinde, avait 59 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Radcliffe Chadderton en 1371, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 4 août 1434, à Salford, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Trafford(이)가 대략 1360년 영국 랭카실르 트래퍼드 먼어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry de Trafford(은)는 70세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Doterinde(은)는 59세였다. 그녀는 1371년 영국에서 Sir John Radcliffe Chadderton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1434년 8월 4일 영국 랭카실르 살퍼드에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Trafford родилась около 1360 г. в местности траффорд манор, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry de Trafford было 70 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Doterinde, 59. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Radcliffe Chadderton в 1371 г. в местности Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 4 августа 1434 г. в местности салфорд, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет.
